overview: Hum Honge Kamyab is a government-branded CSR platform for Shree Cement, connecting students, job seekers, employers, and training centers to support youth empowerment and employment across Chhattisgarh. Features include course enrollment, job portal, placement tracking, and multi-role dashboards.
features: English/Hindi language toggle in header (current session)
Auto-translation of UI text to Hindi
Admin-only project source code download as ZIP
Role-based dashboards for Admin, Student, Employer, Job Seeker
Job portal with search, apply, and candidate management
